personal.mfaHint: Add an extra layer of security at login.

system.title: System Settings
system.readOnly: You can view system settings but cannot change them.

help.monitoring.active_max_age_sec: Age of the last location for a worker to still count as active
help.monitoring.inactive_threshold_sec: Age of the last location before status changes active → inactive
help.monitoring.missing_threshold_sec: Age of the last location before status becomes missing (used by the status calculator + background sweeper)
help.monitoring.staffing_debounce_sec: Quiet period before an understaffed alert is sent
help.geofence.outside_area_grace_sec: How long a worker may be outside the boundary before being marked outside the area
help.schedule.materialization_days: How many days ahead recurring schedules are generated (ADR-047)
help.maps.browser_key: Maps key for the web; stored encrypted
help.maps.map_id: Vector Map ID from Google Cloud — required for Advanced Markers; bind both light + dark styles to it
help.monitoring.location_ping_interval_sec: How often devices send their location to the server
help.geofence.tolerance_m: Distance leeway from the boundary before counting as outside
help.schedule.min_shift_duration_min: Minimum duration for a clock-out to count as a valid shift
help.fcm.enabled: Turn off to stop all push notifications immediately
help.ratelimit.global_per_min: Total requests per IP per minute
help.ratelimit.global_ttl_ms: Length of the time window for the global request limit
help.ratelimit.login_per_min: Login attempts per IP per minute (anti brute-force)
help.auth.login_throttle_ttl_ms: Length of the time window for login-attempt throttling
help.auth.change_password_throttle_max: Change-password attempts allowed within one time window
help.auth.change_password_throttle_ttl_ms: Length of the change-password throttle window
help.app.default_locale: Initial language for new users before they choose a preference

general.identityHint: Your full name and profile photo can be changed on the Profile page. Username and role are managed by the system administrator.
general.darkModeHint: Switch between light and dark themes for this console.
general.languageHint: Choose the display language for this console.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.loadError: Failed to load notification preferences. Please try again later.
